title: Non-record WIP: Systematic Eval-Time Prediction Mixing | Requesting compute credits for full 8xH100 evaluation.
author: sargonxg
body:
## Non-record: Concordia Discors — Systematic Eval-Time Prediction Mixing

First systematic ablation study of eval-time prediction mixing for Parameter Golf. Four complementary predictors benchmarked across 10 configurations on a trained model.

### Key Finding

The LZ77 match model provides the largest single eval-time improvement (+0.040 BPB), outperforming the n-gram cache (+0.011 BPB) that dominates the current leaderboard frontier.

### Ablation Results (1xH100, 1143 steps, 20K val tokens)

| Config | BPB | Delta |
|--------|-----|-------|
| Neural only | 5.0826 | baseline |
| **+ Match model (w=0.05)** | **5.0425** | **+0.0400** |
| + Cache+Match (0.05, 0.05) | 5.0466 | +0.0360 |
| + ALL three (0.05, 0.03, 0.02) | 5.0575 | +0.0251 |
| + N-gram cache (w=0.05) | 5.0714 | +0.0112 |
| + FST only (w=0.05) | 5.0826 | +0.0000 |

### Predictors (all zero artifact cost, eval-time only)

- **LZ77 Match Model** — Longest exact substring match in scored tokens. Predicts continuation. The historian.
- **N-gram Cache (order 8)** — Backward-looking, entropy-adaptive. Legal per Mar 25 ruling. The pattern recognizer.
- **FST Grammar** — 67 HTML tags, 73 boilerplate phrases, URL/JSON. The rules expert. (Minimal on Trafilatura-cleaned text.)

### Additional Explorations

- **S4D State-Space Layer** — O(n) attention replacement, 50% param savings per block (OpenAI wishlist item)
- **Product Key Memory** — 4,096-slot associative memory, needs 8xH100
- **Custom 1536 tokenizer** — 30% fewer tokens, BPB verified

### Projected 8xH100

With SOTA neural base (1.12 BPB) + match model + cache: estimated 0.92-1.00 BPB

### Files

match_model.py, ngram_cache.py, fst_predictor.py, hybrid_eval.py, ssm_layer.py, pkm_layer.py

Requesting compute credits for full 8xH100 evaluation.
